title: oxera glandulosa
intro: Oxera glandulosa, also known as the Pineapple Blossom or Pineapple Flower, is a flowering plant native to the Pacific Islands, particularly Tahiti, which is now cultivated in other tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Oxera glandulosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Oxera glandulosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. Oxera glandulosa can be prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal purposes, and its essential oil is also used in aromatherapy and as a flavoring agent in various culinary applications.
